originalAlarm.description: The value written to `&__len_1887` is never used.

sanitizedDescription: The value written to `&len` is never used.
reasoning: The final value of len after len += sprintf(...) at L36 is never read — printf at L38 uses iobuf not len, and the function returns. Genuine dead store of len. No // ERROR for this specific alarm, new bug. PC = !STRICT_ANSI AND !__need___FILE: !__need___FILE is non-restrictive, but the PC misses the GZIP feature flag constraint (the dead store occurs when GZIP=T triggers the L35-36 block) and excludes STRICT_ANSI=T configs where the same dead store exists. Over-constrained.
